SELECT
        TO_CHAR(f.created_at, 'YYYY-MM') as month,
        COUNT(f.id),
        SUM(f.file_size) 
    FROM
        files f 
    WHERE
        f.deleted = false 
    GROUP BY
        month 
    ORDER BY
        month DESC 
    LIMIT
        6
